title: Generics, Type Sets, Constraints, Inference, and Iteration · Language Lens: Type Parameters Inference
summary: A collection library needs reusable operations without reflection, lost relationships, over-broad constraints, or unreadable APIs. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go type parameters inference increment in a constrained reusable collection library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define generic functions and types, follow type inference, and retain relationships among parameters and results.
Review direct and transitive dependency additions, version upgrades, licenses, checksums, vulnerability evidence, and rollback.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
